creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 168641
showbeastie.diff

I've updated the patch to also fix other issues:
- showbeastie does not compile as a normal user, because I've used COPYTREE_SHARE which sets the wrong permissions
- Build artifacts (*.o, *.a, testmain) from ${SRC_BASE}/sys/boot/ficl are copied too
